seoTitle: Charlotte Bay vs Charmhaven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Charlotte Bay and Charmhaven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Charlotte Bay vs Charmhaven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Charlotte Bay and Charmhaven.
heading: Charlotte Bay vs Charmhaven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charlotte Bay, New South Wales and Charmhaven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Charmhaven has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Charlotte Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Charlotte Bay or Charmhaven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charlotte Bay has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Charmhaven scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charlotte Bay scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Charmhaven scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charlotte Bay or Charmhaven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Charmhaven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
